---
title: "Hydro"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---


# Too big to handle this script use Q_Processing_python.py instead it handles huge tables better. 
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(arrow)
  library(dplyr)
})

source("SRC/Functions_Paths.R")

drivers_feather <- daily_drivers_out  # your .feather path
drivers_parquet_dir <- file.path(dirname(drivers_feather), "drivers_daily_joined_PET_parquet")

# Read feather (this may still be big, but usually feasible; if not, see note below)
drivers_daily <- arrow::read_feather(drivers_feather) %>%
  mutate(
    comid = as.integer(comid),
    date  = as.Date(date)
  )

# Write as a parquet dataset (partitioning helps future joins)
arrow::write_dataset(
  drivers_daily,
  path = drivers_parquet_dir,
  format = "parquet",
  partitioning = c("comid"),
  existing_data_behavior = "overwrite"
)

cat("WROTE parquet dataset:", drivers_parquet_dir, "\n")

```

```{r}
# Load merged climate vars with PET
drivers_daily <- read_feather(daily_drivers_out) %>%
  mutate(
    comid = as.integer(comid),
    date  = as.Date(date)
  )
```

```{r}
# load flows
q_obs <- read_parquet(q_path) %>%
  transmute(
    comid = as.integer(comid),
    Date  = as.Date(Date),
    q_m3s = as.numeric(q_m3s)
  )
```

```{r}
# Merge daily drivers and flow
df <- drivers_daily %>%
  left_join(q_obs, by = c("comid", "date" = "Date")) %>%
  rename(q_m3s_obs = q_m3s)

```

```{r}
catchment_out <- file.path(nhd_dir, "catchments.gpkg")
catchments_df <- st_read(catchment_out, quiet = TRUE) %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  transmute(
    comid   = as.integer(comid),
    areasqkm = as.numeric(areasqkm),
    area_m2  = areasqkm * 1e6
  )

df <- df %>%
  left_join(catchments_df, by = "comid") %>%
  mutate(
    q_mm_day = ifelse(!is.na(q_m3s_obs) & !is.na(area_m2) & area_m2 > 0,
                      (q_m3s_obs * 86400) / area_m2,
                      NA_real_)
  )

```

```{r}
flowline_out <- file.path(nhd_dir, "flowlines.gpkg")
flowlines <- st_read(flowline_out, quiet = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(comid = as.integer(comid))

flowlines_df <- flowlines %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  transmute(
    comid      = as.integer(comid),
    Slope      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(slope)),
    LengthKM   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(lengthkm)),
    streamorde = suppressWarnings(as.integer(streamorde)),
    fromnode   = suppressWarnings(as.integer(fromnode)),
    tonode     = suppressWarnings(as.integer(tonode))
  )

df <- df %>%
  left_join(flowlines_df %>% select(comid, Slope, LengthKM, streamorde), by = "comid")


```

```{r}
# Build edge list for graph models

edge_list <- flowlines_df %>%
  select(comid, fromnode, tonode) %>%
  filter(!is.na(fromnode), !is.na(tonode))
```

```{r}
cat("drivers_daily rows:", nrow(drivers_daily), " unique comid:", dplyr::n_distinct(drivers_daily$comid), "\n")
cat("q_obs rows:", nrow(q_obs), " unique comid:", dplyr::n_distinct(q_obs$comid), "\n")
cat("df (nodes) rows:", nrow(df), " unique comid:", dplyr::n_distinct(df$comid),
    " date range:", as.character(min(df$date)), "to", as.character(max(df$date)), "\n")
cat("pct rows with observed q:", round(100 * mean(!is.na(df$q_m3s_obs)), 2), "%\n")

cat("flowlines rows:", nrow(flowlines_df), " unique comid:", dplyr::n_distinct(flowlines_df$comid), "\n")
cat("edge_list rows:", nrow(edge_list), " unique comid:", dplyr::n_distinct(edge_list$comid), "\n")

```


```{r}
# Save outputs
write_parquet(df, out_path_nodes)
write_parquet(edge_list, out_path_edges)

```

```{r}
drivers_daily_joined <- read_feather(file.path(daily_drivers_dir, "drivers_daily_joined_PET.feather"))
```
